flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lourdes University fell 33% between 2021 and 2024 (811 → 543).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 27% at Lourdes University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (668 vs 909).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 5 pp at Lourdes University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (38.1% vs 43.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lourdes University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).
